task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Key-Value Store** (Level 3)

Build an in-memory key-value store. POST /api/store receives { key, value } and saves it. GET /api/store/:key returns { key, value } or 404 if not found. DELETE /api/store/:key removes the key.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

# Your code here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/store with body {"key":"color","value":"blue"} вҶ’ expect {"status":200}
  - GET /api/store/color вҶ’ expect {"status":20
final_source:
/*
KEY-VALUE STORE:
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Frontend (Test Client)                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  POST /api/store { key, value }         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  GET /api/store/:key                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  DELETE /api/store/:key                 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
              вҶ“ вҶ‘
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Backend (In-Memory Store)              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Store table with key (unique)        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - POST saves to Store                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - GET retrieves by key or 404          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - DELETE removes by key                в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
*/

build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Store table:
  key, required, unique
  value

when user sends store to /api/store:
  requires login
  saved = save store to Store
  send back saved with status 200

when user calls GET /api/store/:key:
  items = get all Store where key is this key
  if length of items is 0:
    send back 'not found' with status 404
  item = first of items
  send back item with status 200

when user calls DELETE /api/store/:key:
  requires login
  delete from Store where key is this key
  send back 'ok' with status 200
